name: Amish Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to desired temperature.
2. In a large bowl, mix the sliced peaches with sugar and salt until evenly coated.
3. Sprinkle the tapioca over the peach mixture and stir gently to combine.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
5. Place the pie in the preheated oven.
6. Bake for the specified time, or until the filling is bubbly and golden brown.
7. Turn off the oven when the pie is done baking.
8. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
